generated_from: Official PTU core evolution policy + Foundry PTR compatibility trees

foundry_default.label: Foundry Compatibility Dataset
foundry_default.notes: Optional compatibility profile. Level methods use listed levels. Item, stone, trade, and other methods are treated as obtainable at level 1.

ptu_builder_105.label: Official PTU Core Rules
ptu_builder_105.notes: This is the builder default. Friendship and item/stone methods follow official PTU builder policy, and known PTU-specific source mismatches can be patched per species. Other methods keep the compatible source behavior.
ptu_builder_105.source: PTU 1.05 core evolution policy + local official overrides
